citations: LLM proposes 500 memory cards, one per CSV row
payload.reason: The input is only a meta-description of a proposed bulk memory export (500 memory cards, one per CSV row) and does not present a stable, user-owned fact to retain. It is also an atomized large-table style input that is not suitable for durable memory storage as-is.
